blocked.missingDimensionsTitle: The default embedding model is incomplete
blocked.missingDimensionsDescription: The current default embedding model is missing vector dimensions and cannot be used for retrieval indexing yet. Open Settings > Models and fix it first.

maintenance.rangeQueueDescription: Backfill aggregatable long-range summaries by fixed ranges.

index.description: Configure chapter retrieval indexing: scope, embedding model, chunking and auto-update strategy.
index.enableOffDesc: Indexing disabled for all projects; search unavailable.
index.enableSelectedDesc: Enable indexing only for the projects selected below.
index.embeddingModelDesc: Embedding model used for the retrieval index (global). Changing it invalidates existing indexes.
index.embeddingModelChangeConfirm: Changing the embedding model invalidates existing retrieval indexes. They must be rebuilt to keep results consistent.
index.rerankEnabledDesc: When enabled, candidate chunks are re-ranked during retrieval to improve accuracy and reduce irrelevant results. A rerank model must be selected.
index.rerankModelNotConfigured: Rerank is enabled but no model is selected; falling back to hybrid-only ranking.
index.chunkSizeInvalid: Chunk size must be an integer >= 1
index.chunkOverlapInvalid: Chunk overlap must be an integer >= 0 and less than chunk size
index.chunkParamsHint: Changing chunking parameters invalidates existing indexes; they must be rebuilt.
index.chunkParamsChangeConfirm: Changing chunking parameters invalidates existing retrieval indexes. They must be rebuilt to keep results consistent.
index.autoImmediateDesc: Update the index immediately after chapter content changes.
index.autoAgentDecidedDesc: Let the agent decide whether to update the index when searching.
index.infoNotConfigured: No usable embedding model configured; indexing unavailable.
